    except SyntaxError as e:
        print\(f'ERR {path.split\(\\"/\\"\)[-1]}: {e}'\)
        sys.exit\(1\)

Bash(python -c "
import ast

checks = {
    'oauth.py': [
        'fitops.config.settings',
        'fitops.utils.exceptions',
        'fitops.utils.logging',
    ],
    'client.py': [
        'fitops.config.settings',
        'fitops.strava.oauth',
        'fitops.utils.cache',
        'fitops.utils.exceptions',
        'fitops.utils.logging',
    ],
    'sync_engine.py': [
        'fitops.config.settings',
        'fitops.config.state',
        'fitops.db.models.activity',
        'fitops.db.models.athlete',
        'fitops.db.session',
        'fitops.strava.client',
        'fitops.utils.exceptions',
        'fitops.utils.logging',
    ],
}

base = 'C:/Users/GL504GS/Desktop/repos/FitOps-CLI/fitops/strava/'
for fname, expected_imports in checks.items\(\):
    with open\(base + fname\) as f:
        tree = ast.parse\(f.read\(\)\)
    found = set\(\)
    for node in ast.walk\(tree\):
        if isinstance\(node, ast.ImportFrom\) and node.module:
            found.add\(node.module\)
    missing = [i for i in expected_imports if i not in found]
    status = 'OK' if not missing else f'MISSING: {missing}'
    print\(f'{fname}: {status}'\)
")
